title: heatExchanger operation
description: Two-stream heat exchanger. THREE modes via `model`: epsNTU (default) rates from a given U + area; geometry COMPUTES U + area + pressure drop from the tube bundle (Gnielinski/Kern); design SIZES the bundle from a duty target. In geometry/design the U and area below are RESULTS, not inputs.

area.title: Heat-transfer area
area.description: Exchanger surface area; larger area raises NTU.

U.title: Overall heat-transfer coefficient
U.description: Overall U for the surface (film, wall and fouling lumped). NTU = U·area / C_min.
